text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Trainer! Can I talk to you 
for a minute please? …Ahem!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: I can't wait for training todaaaay!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! I wanted you to know how motivated 
I am for our training, so I thought I'd do it 
in person! I'm ready for anything today!
